description: Domain architecture visualization comparing IL23R and PRLR
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 6), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1, 1]})

def draw_protein(ax, name, length, domains, tm_start, tm_end, title_extra=""):
    # Draw backbone
    ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0, 0.35), length, 0.3, 
                                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.01", 
                                          facecolor='#e0e0e0', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5))
    
    # Draw domains
    colors = {
        'Ig-like': '#4CAF50',
        'FN3': '#2196F3',
        'FN3 + EpoR lig-bind': '#FF9800',
        'TM': '#F44336',
        'Stalk': '#9E9E9E',
        'Signal': '#FFEB3B',
        'Cytoplasmic': '#CE93D8',
        'WSXWS': '#000000',
    }
    
    for d_name, start, end, d_type in domains:
        color = colors.get(d_type, '#999')
        height = 0.3 if d_type != 'WSXWS' else 0.1
        y_offset = 0.35 if d_type != 'WSXWS' else 0.7
        
        if d_type == 'WSXWS':
            ax.annotate(d_name, xy=(start, 0.7), fontsize=7, ha='center', 
                       color='red', fontweight='bold')
            ax.plot([start], [0.65], 'v', color='red', markersize=6)
        else:
            ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((start, y_offset), end-start, height,
                                                  boxstyle="round,pad=0.01",
                                                  facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', 
                                                  linewidth=1, alpha=0.8))
            # Label
            mid = (start + end) / 2
            ax.text(mid, 0.5, d_name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, 
                   fontweight='bold', color='white' if d_type != 'Signal' else 'black')
    
    ax.set_xlim(-10, max(length, 630) + 10)
    ax.set_ylim(0, 1.0)
    ax.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=10)
    ax.set_title(f'{name} {title_extra}', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
    ax.set_yticks([])
    
    # Add scale bar labels
    for pos in [0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600]:
        if pos <= length:
            ax.axvline(pos, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.3)

# IL23R domains
il23r_domains = [
    ('SP', 1, 23, 'Signal'),
    ('Ig-like', 24, 126, 'Ig-like'),
    ('FN3-1', 127, 217, 'FN3'),
    ('FN3-2', 219, 318, 'FN3'),
    ('Stalk', 319, 355, 'Stalk'),
    ('TM', 356, 376, 'TM'),
    ('Cytoplasmic', 377, 629, 'Cytoplasmic'),
    ('WQPWS', 304, 304, 'WSXWS'),
]

# PRLR domains
prlr_domains = [
    ('SP', 1, 24, 'Signal'),
    ('FN3-1\n+EpoR-LB', 27, 128, 'FN3 + EpoR lig-bind'),
    ('FN3-2', 129, 229, 'FN3'),
    ('TM', 235, 258, 'TM'),
    ('Cytoplasmic', 259, 622, 'Cytoplasmic'),
    ('WIKWS', 148, 148, 'WSXWS'),
    ('WSAWS', 215, 215, 'WSXWS'),
]

draw_protein(axes[0], 'IL23R (Q5VWK5)', 629, il23r_domains, 356, 376, 
            '— Interleukin-23 receptor')
draw_protein(axes[1], 'PRLR (P16471)', 622, prlr_domains, 235, 258, 
            '— Prolactin receptor')

# Add legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFEB3B', edgecolor='black', label='Signal peptide'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#4CAF50', edgecolor='black', label='Ig-like domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#2196F3', edgecolor='black', label='FN3 domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF9800', edgecolor='black', label='FN3 + EpoR lig-binding (PRLR only)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#F44336', edgecolor='black', label='Transmembrane'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#CE93D8', edgecolor='black', label='Cytoplasmic'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#9E9E9E', edgecolor='black', label='Stalk region'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=4, fontsize=8,
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.05))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain architecture comparison figure saved.")
